news.summary: Angry residents, who said their lives were in danger, set fires and clashed with police as they protested the facility intended to treat Americans.

news.headline: Key hearing for the man accused of killing Charlie Kirk will be public, judge rules
news.summary:
Reporters and the public will be allowed to attend a key hearing for the man accused of killing Charlie Kirk, after a Utah judge on Monday denied a defence request to restrict access.
